backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all data types (UserProfile, Couple, planner entries, journal entries, VisionBoard, etc.), initializing access control state, and exposing the app's canister API with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that defines old and new actor state shapes and provides a `run` function to migrate data (notably VisionBoardEntry) from the previous schema to the current one.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the hard-coded maximum cap on Vision Board goals was removed in `VisionBoard.tsx`, allowing unlimited goals, with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short human-readable summaries of each frontend source file, used as build planning reference for the project's frontend pages, hooks, and styles.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for the light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled "Future Us" that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app file that sets up TanStack Router with all page routes, renders the navigation bar with couple-mode badge, handles the profile setup modal on first login, and wires together authentication via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated (or anonymous) ICP actor using the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including user profiles, couple management, and journal/planner entries, using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for a warm cream/amber color palette with light and dark mode variants.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CoupleSettings.tsx: Page component for managing couple connections, allowing users to link with a partner via Principal ID or dissolve an existing couple relationship.
frontend/src/pages/DailyPlanner.tsx: Page component for a daily planner with mood tracking, tasks, schedule, water intake, and a read-only partner view, navigable by date.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Dashboard page displaying a daily inspirational quote, weekly task progress, vision board summary, and navigation shortcuts to other app sections.
frontend/src/pages/JournalSection.tsx: A multi-tab journaling page supporting daily, emotional, night reflection, and growth journal types with date navigation, emotion/growth-area tag selection, and read-only partner journal viewing.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyPlanner.tsx: A monthly planner page that lets users manage goals, important dates, budgets, and mood tracking for a selected month, with a read-only view of the partner's monthly entry.
frontend/src/pages/VisionBoard.tsx: A vision board page where users can create, edit, delete, and track progress on categorized long-term goals by year, with a read-only view of the partner's vision board entries.
frontend/src/pages/WeeklyPlanner.tsx: A weekly planner page for managing priorities, habit tracking, and tasks by ISO week, with week navigation and a read-only partner weekly entry view.
frontend/src/pages/YearlyPlanner.tsx: A yearly planner page for setting a word of the year, major goals, vision images, and yearly habit tracking, with a read-only partner yearly entry view.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts, an extended color palette (warm/pastel tones), border radii, and box shadows for the app's design system.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for a couples journaling app ('Future Us'), tracking a pending fix request to remove the hard-coded maximum cap on vision board goals in both frontend and backend.
